title: casuarina suberosa var. muelleriana
intro: Casuarina suberosa var. muelleriana is a type of tree native to Australia, belonging to the family Casuarinaceae. It is also known as the 'Ironwood' tree due to its extremely hard wood, which has been used for various purposes, including tool-making and construction. The medicinal properties of Casuarina suberosa var. muelleriana include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant include tea infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which are believed to have numerous health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing.
